hero.title: Playa Venao, Panama — Your Perfect Escape on the Pacific Coast
hero.subtitle: A hidden gem in Central America. Wild nature, open ocean, mountains and waterfalls — all in one place.

vibe.title: The Vibe
vibe.text: Calm days, social nights. The perfect balance between quiet and connection. Slow mornings, sea air and nature. Evenings with people, music and good energy. Come solo, as a couple, or with your best friends — either way you'll never feel alone. It's easy to meet new people, and the overall feeling is less 'tourist' and more like joining a different way of life. Barefoot walks, laptops by the sea, sunset surf sessions and evenings together at beach bars.

local.title: Local Knowledge
local.body: We know Playa Venao, Panama up close — local knowledge that makes all the difference.

care.title: We Handle Everything
care.body: We take care of everything for you, from logistics to the smallest details.

personal.title: Personalized
personal.body: A trip tailored exactly to you. Solo, as a couple, or as a family — we customize everything. You focus on the experience; we handle the rest.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Playa Venao Adventures — your team for an authentic Panama vacation. We connect people, nature and experiences — without feeling like tourists.
about.body: Playa Venao is more than a surf destination. It's an international community, a boho-chic beach vibe, and a lifestyle that blends work, adventure and rest. We're here to plan, book and care for everything — so you can simply be.

welcome.body:
Playa Venao is a unique tropical beach town in southern Azuero Peninsula, Panama, on the Pacific coast. It's one of Central America's most distinctive and fast-growing destinations, offering wild nature, open ocean, green hills and waterfalls — all in one location.

Unlike large, crowded, commercial tourist hubs, Playa Venao keeps an authentic, simple, intimate feel. The town is built around one main road with easy access and short walks everywhere: from the sea and hills to restaurants, cafés, surf shops, an art studio, yoga and supermarkets. The slow pace and magnetic energy make many travelers come for a few days — and stay for weeks or months.

atmosphere.title: Local atmosphere and vibe
atmosphere.body:
What makes Playa Venao special is true freedom and an open, communal vibe. People walk barefoot, surf at sunset, work on laptops facing the waves, and gather in beachfront bars in the evenings.

There's a perfect balance between slow, calm mornings in nature and vibrant social life — friendly nights, beach and pool parties, and live music. The town attracts an international mix of surfers, digital nomads, couples, families, creators and entrepreneurs. It's easy to connect, and you'll quickly feel at home — arriving as guests and leaving like family.

nomads.title: Digital nomads and remote work
nomads.intro: In recent years Playa Venao has become one of the world's most sought-after destinations for digital nomads and remote workers. High quality of life, tropical calm and relatively good internet draw people who want to run their business or job from the ocean.

items.coworking: Coworking and cafés: the area has coworking spaces and designed cafés suited for long laptop work sessions.
items.community: Strong online community: an active social network of entrepreneurs, tech people, creators and creatives from around the world — quality networking alongside leisure.
items.lodging: Long-stay lodging: beyond hostels and hotels, you'll find apartment complexes and surf camps offering comfortable stays for remote workers.

weather.title: Weather and seasons in Playa Venao
weather.intro: Playa Venao enjoys tropical warm weather year-round, with pleasant summer-like temperatures almost always. The year has two main seasons:

items.drySeason: Dry season (December to April): the most popular tourist season — lots of sun, clear skies and perfect days for beach time, trips and local activities.
items.greenSeason: Green / rainy season (May to November): nature comes alive and surrounding hills turn lush and wild. Despite rain, most days stay warm and pleasant for travel. Highly recommended for surfers thanks to bigger, quality waves and fewer crowds on the beach.

culinary.title: Food, wellness and lifestyle
culinary.body:
Beyond surfing and scenery, Venao offers a diverse, surprisingly high-level culinary scene thanks to chefs and expats who settled here.

Global flavors: modern Greek by the sea (Yaso), comforting Middle Eastern (Kolaus), homestyle local touches (Michala), plus fresh fish, pizza and sushi.

Healthy living and wellness: the town promotes balance and wellbeing. Along the beach you'll find colorful açaí bowls (Sol), natural juices and plant-based menus. There are also yoga, pilates, fitness, breathwork workshops and ice baths in nature.

lodging.title: Lodging Options
lodging.intro: Comfortable, pleasant places — all within walking distance of the beach. Travel your way, feel right at home.

hostels.title: Social Hostels
hostels.body: Ideal for solo travelers, surfers and those seeking a young, social atmosphere. Most are very close to the beach with shared lounges, pools, bars and weekly social events.

boutique.title: Beach Boutique Hotels
boutique.body: Perfect for couples and those seeking a calmer, design-forward stay. Private rooms, pools, restaurants and ocean views.

apartments.title: Apartments & Guest Complexes
apartments.body: Great for friend groups, families and longer stays. Includes kitchen, living room and workspaces for independent living.

villas.title: Private Jungle & Mountain Villas
villas.body: Quiet natural settings offering full privacy, open ocean views, sunsets, private pools and direct connection to tropical nature.

resorts.title: Resorts & Premium Experience
resorts.body: Full hospitality with pools, restaurants, spa areas, yoga spaces and direct beach access — everything in one place.

culinary.title: Culinary Destination
culinary.intro: Good food, great energy. Culinary abundance and good vibes all day long. Eat well, feel better, enjoy every moment.

yasu.name: Yasu
yasu.description: Modern Greek flavors on the waterfront. Fresh meals, tropical atmosphere, clean and vibrant.

sol.name: Sol
sol.description: Fresh bowls and tropical vibes. Light, colorful and full of energy.

coleos.name: Coleos
coleos.description: Middle Eastern with Asian touches. Comfort food exactly as it should be.

michaela.name: Michaela
michaela.description: Local flavors with a homestyle touch. Simple, fresh and full of taste.

surfPage.heroBadge: SURF IS THE SOUL OF PLAYA VENAO
surfPage.title: The Complete Surf Experience in Playa Venao
surfPage.intro: Playa Venao is one of Central America's most renowned and consistent surf destinations, with excellent waves that work year-round. Whether you're an experienced surfer looking to charge, learning to stand on a wave for the first time, or simply love the beach lifestyle and vibe — surfing here is the beating heart of the place.
surfPage.intro2: Venao's main beach offers perfect, safe, and comfortable conditions for progression and fast learning. To ensure the highest standard, we work in close partnership with Shokogi Surf School — the leading surf school in Central America.
surfPage.quote: One of the most comfortable and fun places to learn and progress in surfing quickly — for all levels!

retreat.title: Surf & Wellness Retreat
retreat.subtitle: The perfect sanctuary for body and mind in Panama's tropical nature.
retreat.body: An immersive retreat that perfectly blends the surf world with a healthy, balanced, energy-filled lifestyle. Suitable for beginners and advanced surfers, it helps you step out of routine, slow down, and reconnect with your body and nature.

includes.lessons: Guided surf lessons and in-water technique training.
includes.photo: Professional surf photography and video analysis to improve performance.
includes.yoga: Surfer yoga, body movement workshops, and meditation.
includes.recovery: Recovery experiences including ice baths, breathwork, and massages.
includes.nutrition: Healthy, nourishing meals: fresh food, natural juices, and smoothie bowls.
includes.nature: Nature trips, hidden waterfalls, and deep connection with the local community.

course.title: Surf Course | Professional Lessons (All Levels)
course.subtitle: The fastest and safest way to get on a wave and progress quickly.
course.body: Our surf courses are taught by certified, professional coaches from Shokogi Surf School. Courses are tailored to your level — from your first steps in the water to advanced techniques for experienced surfers.

includes.private: Private one-on-one lessons or intimate group sessions.
includes.theory: Beach theory: understanding the ocean, currents, beach safety, and proper stance.
includes.practice: Guided in-water practice with close coach support at every moment.
includes.boardFit: Precise board selection for your body type and surf level.
includes.video: Optional video analysis to correct mistakes in real time.

rental.title: Surfboard Rental
rental.subtitle: Don't haul boards from home — Venao's most advanced garage awaits you.
rental.body: Playa Venao offers a variety of spots and changing wave types. Our rental service gives you full flexibility and access to top-quality equipment so you can match your board to the conditions each day.

includes.variety: A huge range of boards: softboards for learning, longboards for fun, and pro shortboards for advanced surfers.
includes.swap: Board swaps during your rental period based on conditions and your progress.
includes.advice: Professional advice and fitting from our local surf team on the beach.
includes.maintenance: Equipment stored and maintained to the highest standard (including wax and fins ready for the water).

yearRound.title: Year-Round Waves
yearRound.body: A consistent point break with reliable swells — great conditions in every season, perfect for flexible trip planning.

allLevels.title: All Skill Levels
allLevels.body: Beginners learn on mellow, protected waves; advanced surfers enjoy stronger sections — everyone gets their wave.

schools.title: Schools & Camps
schools.body: Surf schools, surf camps (like SHOKOGI SURF SCHOOL), board rentals, private and group lessons.

community.title: Surf Community
community.body: A strong international community — sunset sessions, social beach vibes, and real connections with people from around the world.

attractions.title: Experiences & Adventures — Discover Venao Inside and Out
attractions.intro: We'll take you far beyond the familiar — from hidden corners to wild adventures under the open sky. Everything is arranged so you can focus entirely on the experience.
attractions.orderFormIntro: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you to confirm your booking.

waterfalls.title: Waterfall Adventure | 4x4 Waterfall Tours
waterfalls.short: Hidden spots deep in Panama's jungles
waterfalls.story:
Waterfall tours around Playa Venao let you experience a completely different side of Panama — jungle, rivers, off-road trails, natural pools and hidden waterfalls in the wild. Much of the experience is the journey itself: 4x4 rides along dirt paths, river crossings and open tropical scenery.

Trips reach waterfalls and natural pools deeper in the Azuero Peninsula's wilderness, far from the main tourist areas. During the day you can swim in cool natural water, jump from the falls, enjoy lunch in nature and experience Panama in a much more authentic way.

The jeep ride itself becomes a central part of the adventure — especially for anyone who loves nature, off-road driving and wild landscapes.
waterfalls.includes:
4x4 off-road ride — an exciting drive along dirt trails and river crossings.
Waterfalls and natural pools — reach hidden, cool spots deep in the jungle.
Lunch in nature — an authentic, filling meal in the tropical landscape.
Refreshments — cold water, fresh fruit and coolers throughout the route.
Water gear and floats — everything you need to enjoy the water and go with the flow (on some tours).

iguana.title: Isla Iguana Tour
iguana.short: A tropical island with turquoise water and snorkeling
iguana.story:
Isla Iguana is one of the most beautiful places on the Azuero Peninsula and one of the most sought-after attractions for travelers coming to Playa Venao. It's a protected tropical island with crystal turquoise water, white sand, wild nature and a wonderfully relaxed atmosphere.

The trip begins with a boat ride along Panama's coastline, where you may sometimes spot dolphins, sea turtles or whales depending on the season. Once on the island, visitors can swim in the clear water, snorkel with tropical fish, relax on the beach and take a short walk on the island itself. It's considered one of the best snorkeling spots in the area thanks to the clean water and protected marine environment.

The experience is perfect for couples, groups of friends and families looking for a calm day in real tropical nature.
iguana.includes:
Full snorkeling gear — for diving and watching tropical fish on the protected coral reef.
Boat trip — a scenic sail along Panama's coast with chances to spot marine wildlife.
Light refreshments — cold water, fresh fruit and coolers throughout the day.
Free time in paradise — relax on white sand, swim in clear water or take a short walk on the island.

fishing.title: Fishing Tour
fishing.short: Fishing trips around Playa Venao are one of the area's most special and popular experiences.
fishing.story:
Fishing trips around Playa Venao are one of the area's most special and popular experiences. Panama's Pacific is considered one of the world's best sport-fishing destinations, with a huge variety of fish and a true ocean experience. Trips usually leave early in the morning when the sea is calmer, and the adventure begins the moment you board the boat and watch the Venao coastline disappear behind you.

Trips suit both complete beginners and more experienced anglers. During the day you head offshore with local guides who know the area and the best fishing spots. A special part of the experience is the open ocean — you may encounter dolphin pods and sometimes even whales in season.

Cold drinks, beers, fruit platters and coolers are served throughout the day for a relaxed, enjoyable time on the water. After returning to shore, your catch can be professionally cleaned. Trips are usually for small groups of up to seven people, for a more personal, comfortable experience.

Common catches in the area include tuna, mahi-mahi, snapper, roosterfish and more — drawing anglers from around the world to Panama.
fishing.includes: Boat for groups up to 7, professional fishing gear, local guides, cold drinks, beers, fruit platters, coolers and professional cleaning of your catch.

horses.title: Horseback Riding | Ride Through Panama's Wild Nature
horses.short: Ride through wild nature with open panoramic views
horses.story:
Horseback riding around Playa Venao is a special way to discover the local landscape at a calmer pace. Routes pass through open countryside, hills, rivers, tropical trails and sometimes along the coast, with wide views of the ocean and mountains.

The experience suits both beginners and experienced riders, usually with local guides who know the area well. Along the ride you see Panama in a quieter, more authentic way — away from roads and busy central areas.

One of the most popular options is a sunset ride, when the sun dropping over the ocean makes the experience even more peaceful and memorable.
horses.includes:
Varied riding routes — green hills, flowing rivers, jungle trails and the coastline.
Professional guidance — experienced local guides who know the terrain.
Transport and refreshments — private round-trip transport, cold water and fresh fruit platters.
All levels welcome — fully adapted for first-time riders in a safe, relaxed atmosphere.

eventsPage.title: Private & Corporate Event Production in Panama
eventsPage.whyTitle: Why produce your event with us?
eventsPage.whyBody: Producing an event far from home in a foreign country requires real local knowledge — language, culture, logistics, transport, and the right vendors and lodging. For most people, managing this remotely is nearly impossible. That's why we're here. We live in Panama, know every corner, speak the language, and work with the most trusted local suppliers. We guide you hand in hand from early planning back home until the last guest boards their flight. Our goal is to bring everything under one roof so you arrive with peace of mind — no headaches, no small details to chase — knowing someone local is making sure everything runs smoothly and professionally.

services.planning: Concept planning and a custom schedule
services.lodging: Diverse lodging solutions for every guest type
services.culinary: Culinary experiences, restaurants, catering and private meals
services.vendors: Local vendors (design, sound, photography, music and more)
services.management: Full logistics management and on-site support throughout your stay
